channel.title: Sawsan Alqahtani on SBMARUF
channel.description: Recent content in Sawsan Alqahtani on SBMARUF

item.title: Stop Taking Tokenizers for Granted: They Are Core Design Decisions in Large Language Models
item.description: Reframing tokenization as a core modeling decision in LLMs rather than a preprocessing step, arguing for context-aware tokenizer and model co-design.

item.title: Beyond Fertility: STRR as a Metric for Multilingual Tokenization Evaluation
item.description: A new metric for multilingual tokenization evaluation that goes beyond fertility-based measures.

item.title: A Systematic Survey and Critical Review on Evaluating Large Language Models: Challenges, Limitations, and Recommendations
item.description: A systematic survey and critical review on evaluating large language models with recommendations for more rigorous evaluation.
